name: skills
description: Bohdan's personal Claude Code skills monorepo. One marketplace, multiple plugins as subdirs.

plugins.name: dream-skill
plugins.description: Sync durable Claude Code and Codex context into Obsidian with bounded retrieval, transactional review, rollback, and measurable canaries.

plugins.name: routing-mode
plugins.description: Route planning to Claude and code execution to the Codex CLI (gpt-5.5) to cut coding costs. The plan is reviewed by a zero-context agent, executed by Codex, and verified by Claude.
